title: Plants Control
description: Hide chosen plants and interact through them for a clearer view.
body:
---
## 🪴 PlantsControl — Clear Your View, Click Through Nature

**PlantsControl** is a lightweight mod that lets you selectively hide plant blocks from rendering, giving you a cleaner and clearer view while exploring, building, or PvPing.

The mod includes full **hit‑through support** — allowing you to attack mobs and break blocks through hidden plants.
A single‑player feature also lets you **prevent selected plants from generating in the world**, keeping your terrain clean from the start.

**New in 1.5.0:** Full **server-side support** — server operators can enforce mod usage, sync settings to all clients, and manage everything via in-game commands or GUI.

---

### ✨ Features

- **Selective plant hiding** — Choose exactly which plants to hide from rendering.
- **Hit‑through** — Attack mobs, mine blocks, and interact through hidden plants.
- **Prevent plant generation (single‑player only)** — Stop chosen plants from spawning naturally in new chunks.
- **Server-side enforcement** — Operators can require clients to have the mod installed and sync plant settings server-wide.
- **Permission-locked server GUI** — Only operators can modify server settings.
- **Configurable kick delay** — Set how long the server waits before kicking clients without the mod (2–30 seconds).
- **Zero performance impact** — Lightweight and efficient.

---

### 🌿 Supported Plants

```
minecraft:grass            minecraft:short_grass       minecraft:tall_grass
minecraft:fern             minecraft:large_fern        minecraft:dead_bush
minecraft:dandelion        minecraft:poppy             minecraft:blue_orchid
minecraft:allium           minecraft:azure_bluet       minecraft:red_tulip
minecraft:orange_tulip     minecraft:white_tulip       minecraft:pink_tulip
minecraft:oxeye_daisy      minecraft:cornflower        minecraft:lily_of_the_valley
minecraft:sunflower        minecraft:lilac             minecraft:rose_bush
minecraft:peony            minecraft:pitcher_plant     minecraft:torchflower
minecraft:brown_mushroom   minecraft:red_mushroom
minecraft:sugar_cane       minecraft:bamboo
```

---

### 🛠 Compatibility

- Fabric Loader
- Compatible with Sodium, Iris, and most rendering mods
- Safe to use on any server
  - Hit‑through and generation blocking are **disabled in multiplayer** unless the server has the mod installed

---

### ⚙️ Commands

**Client:**
- `/grm on` / `/grm off` / `/grm toggle` — Enable, disable, or toggle hiding
- `/grm status` — Show current client status
- `/grm gui` — Open the client configuration screen
- `/grm sgui` — Open the server configuration screen (operators only)

**Server (operators only):**
- `/grm server requires` — Toggle whether clients must have the mod installed
- `/grm server status` — Show current server configuration

---

### 🚧 In Development

<details>
<summary>Upcoming features</summary>

- Grass fading when walking through it
- Multi-version support
- Additional customization options

</details>
